response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate due to his direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second. His background strongly aligns with the mindset and nice-to-have requirements of an AI-driven engineering environment, and he has proven Staff-level technical leadership. While he lacks the mandatory strong Python skills, his polyglot nature, deep systems thinking, and open-source contributions suggest he could adapt quickly, making him well worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record with high-throughput distributed architectures, handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Extensive Staff-level experience with a strong ownership mindset, technical strategy execution, and open-source project leadership.
concerns: No mention of Python experience, which is listed as a strong must-have technical skill for the role.
Tenure in the most relevant AI-native role at re:cinq appears very brief, indicating potentially limited long-term exposure to these specific systems in production.
Heavy reliance on niche languages like DLang in past high-performance roles rather than mainstream enterprise languages.
